reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
늘 먹이고있는 유산균이에요.
재구매 몇통째인지 알수가 없네요.
바잇미 닥터이너피스 유산균을 급여하면 복명음이 줄고 변 상태가 좋아지는게 눈에 띄어서 꾸준히 급여하고 있답니다.
무엇보다 맛이 좋은지 강쥐가 단독급여, 토핑급여 가리지 않고 잘 먹어요.
그릇에 뿌릴때 냄새가 나는데 사람 유산균처럼 맛있는 냄새가 난답니다.
바잇미 닥터이너피스 장튼튼 유산균 최고!!
추천합니다🙂
reviews.content_en: This is a probiotic I give regularly. I've lost count of how many times I've repurchased it. When I give BITE ME Doctor Inner Peace probiotics, I can clearly see a reduction in stomach sounds and improvement in stool quality, so I keep giving it consistently. Most importantly, my pup loves the taste so much that he eats it well whether it's given alone or as a topping. There's a smell when I sprinkle it in the bowl, and it smells deliciously like human probiotics. BITE ME Doctor Inner Peace gut-healthy probiotics are the best!! I highly recommend it🙂

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
맛있는 까까던 영양제던 먹을것에 낯가리는 까탈쟁이가 손에 덜어주기만해도 신나게 먹어요ㅜㅜㅜㅜ
유산균 안먹는애? 그 신기한 강아지가 저희집 애 였답니다
유통기한은 내년 5월1일까지인 제품들이고
1박스안에 10개씩 3봉지로 소포장되있는데 습기제거제까지 꼼꼼히 넣어주셨네요
포장까지 감동주는 배운집사 바잇미🧡
4개월치 떨어질쯤 또 행사했음 좋겠네요ㅎㅎ
좋은제품 감사합니다🙇🏻‍♀️
reviews.content_en: My pup is such a picky eater with treats and supplements, but he eats excitedly the moment I pour it into his hand ㅜㅜㅜㅜ A dog that won't eat probiotics? That was actually my pet! The expiration date on the products is May 1st next year, and the box contains 3 pouches with 10 packets each, and they even thoughtfully included a desiccant. BITE ME shows such thoughtfulness even in packaging 🧡 I hope they have another sale when this 4-month supply runs out ㅎㅎ Thank you for such a great product 🙇🏻‍♀️

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
울애기가 면역력도 떨어지고 계속 설사중이였는데
마침 세일하길래 구매했어요
지금 2주정도 먹였는데 대박입니다
알러지부자에 털부자여서 나름 열심히 관리해줬었는데 그래도 눈물에 긁긁에 발챱챱이 멈추질 않았어요
이거 먹고 4~5일째부터 모든게 없어졌어요
기호성도 최고고 효과는 말할 필요가 없어요
정말 최고입니다
냄새는 홍삼냄새가 많이 나서 입까다로운 울애기 안먹을줄 알았더니 너무 잘먹어요
입맛 까다롭다고 고민할 필요가 전혀 없는 영양제에요
건강해지는게 눈에 보이니깐 안먹일 수가 없어서 세일할때 또 쟁여놓으려고요
정말 최고!!!
reviews.content_en: My baby's immune system was weak and he was constantly having diarrhea. Then there was a sale, so I purchased it. After about 2 weeks of giving it, it's amazing. Since he's prone to allergies and has a lot of fur, I was managing it carefully, but the tearing, scratching, and paw licking just wouldn't stop. Around day 4-5 after taking this, everything disappeared. The palatability is the best and the results speak for themselves. It's truly the best. It has a strong red ginseng smell, and I thought my picky eater wouldn't eat it, but he eats it so well. There's no need to worry about picky eating with this supplement. Since I can see the improvement in health, I can't help but give it, and I plan to stock up again when there's a sale. Truly the best!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 처음에 살까 말까 고민 되게많이 했었는데 사길 잘했단 생각이 드네요! 처음부터 드라마틱한 효과는 없었는데 먹이면서 2주동안 차츰 똥이 좋아지기 시작하면서 이제는 맛동산 생산해내십니다ㅠㅠ 감격.. 동물용 유산균이라 더 안심하고 급여할 수 있을 거 같아요! 그리고 향이 되게 강한데 맛은 거의 안나서 (직접 먹어봄..) 냥님들도 습식에 타주면 거부감없이 먹어주네요! 사진은 조약돌 똥에서 유산균 덕에 1주일동안 진화한 똥입니당!! 지금 변상태는 더!! 좋아졌어용 바로 재구매하러 갑니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was really hesitant at first, but I'm so glad I bought it! There wasn't a dramatic effect from the start, but as I kept giving it, over 2 weeks his poop gradually improved, and now he's producing premium quality stools ㅠㅠ Amazing.. Since it's a veterinary probiotic, I feel even more confident giving it! And while the scent is very strong, it barely has a taste (I tried it myself..) so my cats eat it without hesitation when I mix it into wet food! The photos show the evolution of his poop from stone-like to normal in 1 week thanks to the probiotics!! His stool quality is even better now ㅎㅎ I'm going straight to repurchase

reviews.name: 람****
reviews.content:
항상 빙글빙글 네다섯바퀴는 돌아야 응가했는데 유산균 꾸준하게 먹으면서는 한바퀴 돌고 바로 응가를 해요! 
예전에 구매해서 먹었는데 기호성도 좋아서 재구매 했어요🤗
reviews.content_en: He used to have to spin around 4-5 times before pooping, but since consistently giving him probiotics, he spins once and poops right away! I purchased this before and liked the palatability, so I repurchased 🤗

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
유산균 이것저것 먹이다 정착한 바잇미 장튼튼이에요.

이왕 사먹이는거 성분 좋은게 좋잖아요.
유산균은 특허균주를 선호하는데 특허균주 사용에,
개별포장으로 위생적이라 너무 편하게 급여하고있어요!

다른곳과 달리 보장균수를 제공해주시니 더 신뢰되구요!

바잇미가 반려동물업체중에서는 대기업이잖아요?ㅎ
대기업들 제품은 눈속임하고 기만하는게 많아서 피하는편인데 상세설명과 같다면 웬만한 업체 제품들보다 좋습니다!

믿고 먹일께요? 히히🫶
reviews.content_en: After trying various probiotics, I've settled on BITE ME Gut Healthy. If I'm going to buy and give it anyway, I prefer good ingredients. I prefer probiotics with patented bacterial strains, and since this uses patented strains and comes in individual packets for hygiene, it's so convenient to administer! The fact that they provide guaranteed bacterial counts compared to other brands makes it more trustworthy! BITE ME is a major company in the pet industry, right? ㅎ I usually avoid major company products since they often try to fool and deceive consumers, but if it matches the detailed description, it's better than most other brands! I'll trust and feed it? Hehe 🫶

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 전에 3갤치 먹고 엄청 효과봐서 이번에도 3갤치 주문했어요 토끼똥에 효과좋아요
reviews.content_en: I gave 3 bottles before and saw great results, so I ordered 3 bottles again this time. It works great for rabbit poop.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 꾸준히 먹이려고 이번에 세일하길래   8개월치 구입했어요 유통기한이 길어서 좋아요  먹이니까 확실히 효과는있어요  항문낭을짜주어도  냄새가났었는데 유산균먹이고부턴  냄새가 많이 줄었어요  저희애는이상하게  항문낭을짜도 똥꼬에서 냄새가조금났었거든요  그래서  유산균 넘좋아요   가루라저는 우유에타서  먹이고있어요  그러면 넘잘먹어요  사료에섞어주기도 하구요
reviews.content_en: I wanted to keep giving it consistently, so I purchased an 8-month supply when there was a sale. The long expiration date is great. There's definitely an effect when I give it. Even after expressing the anal glands, there used to be an odor, but since I started giving probiotics, the smell has reduced a lot. My pet somehow had a slight smell even after expressing the anal glands, so I really love the probiotics. I mix the powder with milk to give it, and he eats it so well. I also mix it into his regular food.

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
장이 좋지 않아서 병원에 갔더니 약 처분이 아니라 유산균을 추천허시더라구요~ 우연찮게 바잇미에서 평이 좋길래 사서 먹였는데 한포 먹고 바로 장이 좋아졌어요!!
응가도 좋아지고, 방귀냄새도 사라졌답니다..!!

대신 단점은 한참 먹이다가 안먹이니 하루 뒤 바로 다시 돌아가여ㅜㅠ 의사선생님께 계속 먹여도 되는지 여쭤봤더니 먹고 효과가 좋았으면 계속 먹이는게 맞다고 해서
지금 4박스째 쉬지 않고 먹고 있는 중입니다
reviews.content_en: My dog's digestive system wasn't good, so I went to the vet and instead of medicine, they recommended probiotics~ I happened to try BITE ME since it had good reviews, and right after eating one packet, his digestive system improved!! His poop got better and the gas smell disappeared..!! The only downside is that when I stopped giving it after feeding it for a while, it went back to normal the next day ㅜㅠ I asked the vet if I could keep giving it, and they said if it worked well, I should keep giving it, so now I'm on my 4th box and haven't stopped giving it.

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 유산균 브랜드들 이것저것 많이 시도해보았는데 향이 너무 강해도 냥이들이 싫어하더라고요~ 무향은 아닌데 까다로운 냥이도 츄르에 섞어서 잘먹었어요. 아주 고운 가루입자예요
reviews.content_en: I've tried many different probiotic brands, but when the scent is too strong, my cats don't like it~ It's not unscented, but even my picky cat ate it well mixed with treats. It's a very fine powder.

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
웰컴쿠폰으로 한통구매 후 1+1 구매하길래 쟁여두려고 
추가구매했어요.
5개월 이갈이시기라 급여량이 줄어드니 배변상태가 좋지않았는데 확실히 먹자마자 미세한 효과가 보이네요.

reviews.content_en: I bought one pack with a welcome coupon and then did a 1+1 purchase, so I decided to stock up with an additional order. My pup is in the teething phase at 5 months old, and the reduced feeding amount was causing digestive issues, but I definitely saw subtle improvements right after feeding it. I sprinkle half a serving twice a day on the food, and since my dog eats the food well, it's like getting two benefits in one ~~^^ The poop consistency is noticeably better!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 거의 1년째 바잇미 장튼튼 유산균 먹고 있어요 ! 이제 유산균 없으면 응가를 제대로 못해요,,, 필수로 하루에 하나씩은 꼭꼭 먹어야한답니당 ㅎㅎ 기호성이 좋아서 밥에 그냥 섞어줘도 잘 먹어요! 사람은 안챙겨먹어도 우리 강아지는 꼬박꼬박 챙겨 먹어야하니까 비싸도 무조건 떨어지지 않도록 쟁여놓는 바잇미 장튼튼 유산균💙
reviews.content_en: I've been giving my dog BITE ME gut health probiotics for almost a year now! At this point, without the probiotics, my pup can't even poop properly,,, so I have to make sure to give one every single day no matter what ㅎㅎ The palatability is so good that I can just mix it in with regular food and my dog eats it right up! Even though I don't always take care of my own probiotics, I make sure our puppy gets theirs consistently every day, so no matter how expensive, I always keep BITE ME gut health probiotics stocked up 💙

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 간편하게 한 포씩 뜯어서 주니 급여가 매우 편해서 좋습니다 여행갈때도 쉽게 챙겨다닐 수 있을거 같아요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so convenient to tear open one packet at a time and give it, so dosing is really easy! I think it'll be easy to bring along when we travel too ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
☆반려견 : 3살 진도믹스/15살 코카스파니엘
☆기호성 : 아주좋음
☆효과 : 아주좋음

올해 15살 노견아이를 입양하며 건강관리에 매우 신경쓰고 있습니다. 심장 눈 이빨이 안좋거든요^^;; 노즈워크 간식은 꼭 여기서만 구매하여 먹이는데 유산균이 있길래 좋으면 얼마나 좋겠어하며 보다가 노견에게 좋다는 말에 어느새 구매버튼을 눌러버렸습니다ㅎㅎ 3살 진도믹스 아이와 15살 코카 둘다 너무 잘먹어요! 냄새는 사람 유산균같은 냄새가 나요 ㅎㅎ 새콤한 향이 나는게 냄새맡는 순간 침이 고이더라구요😋 3살아이는 그냥 생으로도(?) 잘먹는데 15살아이는 안먹길래 강아지츄르에 주니 잘먹어요^^먹고나서 대변을 보는데 3살아이는 워낙 잘 싸서(?) 급여 전후를 잘 모르겠으나 15살 아이는 가끔 대변을 힘들게 볼때가 있거든요ㅠㅠ 그래서 한자리에 오래 쭈그려있지를 못해서 돌아다니면서 싸는데 유산균 덕분인지 똥을 단번에 잘싸요ㅋㅋ 확실히 대변상태도 차이가 나는것 같습니다~ 그전에는 너무 딱딱했는데 유산균 먹인 후는 촉촉하게 보더라구요 좀 더 먹여보고 후기 수정하도록 하겠습니다:)
reviews.content_en:
☆Pet: 3-year-old Jindo mix / 15-year-old Cocker Spaniel
☆Palatability: Excellent
☆Effectiveness: Excellent

After adopting a senior dog this year at age 15, I've been very careful about health management. Her heart, eyes, and teeth aren't in great shape ^^;; I always buy nose work treats from this brand, and when I saw they had probiotics, I hoped it would be good for my older pup, and before I knew it, I hit the buy button after hearing it was good for senior dogs ㅎㅎ Both my 3-year-old Jindo mix and my 15-year-old Cocker eat it so well! The smell is like human probiotics ㅎㅎ The tangy scent makes my mouth water the moment I smell it 😋 The 3-year-old eats it just fine as-is (?), but the 15-year-old wouldn't eat it, so I give it to her mixed with dog churu and she eats it well ^^ After eating, they poop—the 3-year-old is such a good pooper(?) that I can't really tell the before and after, but the 15-year-old sometimes has trouble pooping, so she couldn't squat in one spot and would walk around while doing it ㅠㅠ But thanks to the probiotics, she poops nicely in one go now ㅋㅋ The stool consistency definitely seems different~ Before, it was very hard, but after starting the probiotics, it looks moisturized ㅎㅎ I'll feed it a bit longer and update this review :)

reviews.content:

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 반려묘가 스트레스받거나 컨디션 안좋을때면 묽을변을 보거나 아예 변을 안봐서 걱정 고민이 많았어서 여러가지 유산균을 급여해봤는데ㅜㅜ 가장 기호성이 좋은 제품인가 같아요ㅎㅎ달달구리맛과 향으로 사료토핑이나 좋아하는 간식이랑 같아 급여해주고있어요! 하루한번 변도 잘보고 변 상태도 좋아지는게 느껴져서 꾸준히 급여해주려고합니닷ㅋㅋ비피더스균으로 믿음도가고 신뢰감 뿜뿜입니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My cat used to get loose stools or wouldn't poop at all when stressed or feeling under the weather, so I was always worried and tried various probiotics ㅜㅜ This seems to be the product with the best palatability ㅎㅎ With its sweet taste and flavor, I give it mixed with food toppers or treats my cat likes! My cat poops once a day and I can feel the stool quality improving, so I'm planning to keep giving it consistently ㅋㅋ With Bifidobacterium, I have confidence and trust radiating from me ㅎㅎ
